Uses of Package
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components

Packages that use fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components
Package
Description
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components
 
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.messages
 
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components used by fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components
    Class
    Description
    Broker
    Composant Broker — cœur du système de publication/souscription conforme au CDC (chapitres 3 et 4).
    Broker.DeliveryTarget
    Cible de livraison pré-calculée par Broker.snapshotTargets(java.lang.String) : associe l'URI d'un abonné, son port outbound de livraison et son filtre courant.
    GossipMessageVisitor
    Visitor interface for processing gossip messages received by a Broker.
    PluginClient
    Composant client basé sur les quatre plugins pub/sub (CDC §3.5.1 et §3.5.2).
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components used by fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.messages
    Class
    Description
    GossipMessageVisitor
    Visitor interface for processing gossip messages received by a Broker.
